name: openclaw-based-multi-agent
description: A production-grade, multi-agent AI assistant built on the **OpenClaw** runtime that answers natural-language real-estate questions over two real MLS datasets (~228K active listings + ~439K sold comps) and communicates through WhatsApp and email. It performs live property search, market analytics, semantic recommendations, retrieval-augmented knowledge answers, and safe, human-approved outbound messaging.
